nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Approval
nodes.notes: Dashboard POSTs: { post_id, action: 'approve'|'reject', scheduled_at?, youtube_video_url? }

nodes.name: Wait: Until Scheduled Time
nodes.notes: Pauses until the optimal IST posting time. n8n resumes automatically.

nodes.name: LinkedIn: Publish Post
nodes.notes: Set LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN and LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID env vars.

nodes.name: Instagram: Create Media Container
nodes.notes: Handles both single image and carousel. carousel_image_urls must be public URLs of each slide image.

nodes.name: Has YouTube Video?
nodes.notes: Only upload to YouTube if a video file URL was provided during approval

nodes.name: YouTube: Upload Short
nodes.notes: Set YOUTUBE_ACCESS_TOKEN env var. Obtain via OAuth2 in n8n credentials for Google. The video file must be a publicly accessible URL (upload to R2/Supabase first, then provide during approval).

nodes.name: YouTube: Get Analytics
nodes.notes: Set YOUTUBE_API_KEY (Google Cloud API key, separate from OAuth token)
